content:
I’m going to load the current index and related launcher files to review hierarchy and spacing, then I’ll mark the critique task in progress.- Marked the remaining todo in progress, completed the 5D critique pass, tightened spacing and hierarchy on the launcher, then marked the todo completed.

Changes in index.html:
- Hierarchy: reduced h1/h2 default margins; added card-specific heading spacing (.card h2) so cards read tighter; toned card body copy to muted for contrast.
- Spacing rhythm: replaced inline grid margin with a .grid.launcher class; added max-width to lead copy (60ch) for better readability.
- Affordance: card hover now uses var(--elev-raised) with a subtle lift.
- Localization: changed eyebrow labels from “Screen/Landing” to “界面/落地页”.

No new files were created; the existing index.html was edited in place.
